name: Pathstow Mystery VR
short_description: Pathstow Mystery VR is a mystic adventure game with a touch of horror and built from the ground up for VR. Created as a SteamVR exclusive it uses all advantages of Room-scale and SteamVR controllers.
detailed_description:
Pathstow Mystery VR is a mystic adventure game with a touch of horror and built from the ground up for VR. Created as a SteamVR exclusive it uses all advantages of Room-scale and SteamVR controllers. Steam Audio solution improves quality of sound effects in VR.

Feel the atmosphere of Pathstow. Pathstow is the town where your friend Max Charlton lives.
Max Charlton asked you to help him with something... supernatural in his new house in Pathstow. Find out Pathstow's secret!
The game features mostly meditative gameplay: The player looks around, investigates the environment, looks for clues, and solves puzzles.

The story is broken down into five episodes of around 15 to 30 minutes in length to allow for intervals in play while enjoying the story.

To prevent any problems with motion sickness game uses teleport-based movement system by default. But you could select artificial locomotion too (head-oriented or, right/left controller - oriented) and move using trackpad.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
